name: Club
description: A simple melee weapon. Cheap, blunt, and emotionally honest.

name: Dagger
description: A small blade that somehow solves too many fantasy problems.

name: Quarterstaff
description: A staff. Also a weapon. Also proof that sticks remain undefeated.

name: Mace
description: A cleric classic. Subtle as a tax audit.

name: Handaxe
description: Small axe. Big opinions.

name: Shortsword
description: A practical blade for practical violence. Wonderful civilization we've built.

name: Longsword
description: The fantasy default weapon, because imagination apparently has office hours.

name: Rapier
description: For elegant stabbing, because people insisted on making stabbing posh.

name: Greatsword
description: A sword large enough to make logistics cry.

name: Shortbow
description: For when the enemy is over there and you prefer they remain there.

name: Longbow
description: A ranged solution to melee-shaped problems.

name: Light Crossbow
description: Mechanical archery, because regular archery demanded effort.

name: Padded Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex modifier. Somehow both armor and a bad fashion decision.

name: Leather Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex modifier. The respectable starting point of not dying immediately.

name: Studded Leather Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex modifier. Leather, but with little metal excuses.

name: Hide Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex modifier, max 2. Nature's questionable hoodie.

name: Chain Shirt
description: AC 13 + Dex modifier, max 2. A compromise, like most party decisions.

name: Scale Mail
description: AC 14 + Dex modifier, max 2. Clanky, protective, socially loud.

name: Breastplate
description: AC 14 + Dex modifier, max 2. Expensive dignity for your torso.

name: Half Plate
description: AC 15 + Dex modifier, max 2. Half plate, full noise.

name: Ring Mail
description: AC 14. Heavy armor for when elegance gave up.

name: Chain Mail
description: AC 16. Requires Str 13. The official outfit of metallic suffering.

name: Splint Armor
description: AC 17. Requires Str 15. Built for people who hate stairs.

name: Plate Armor
description: AC 18. Requires Str 15. Very safe, very loud, very expensive.

name: Shield
description: +2 AC when equipped. A portable wall with delusions of heroism.

name: Holy Symbol
description: A divine spellcasting focus. For outsourced miracles.

name: Arcane Focus
description: An arcane spellcasting focus. Magic bureaucracy, but shiny.

name: Component Pouch
description: A pouch of material components. Tiny objects, huge bookkeeping energy.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: A starter pack for adventurers who plan to survive nature's petty complaints.

name: Priest's Pack
description: Candles, alms, incense, vestments, and other holy logistics.

name: Healer's Kit
description: Stabilizes dying creatures. Society calls this a medical breakthrough.

name: Hempen Rope
description: 50 feet of rope. The real main character of every adventuring party.

name: Torch
description: A stick that burns so the party can discover worse decisions in color.

name: Rations
description: One day of trail food. Morale damage not included.

name: Potion of Healing
description: Restores 2d4 + 2 hit points. Liquid apology from the dice.
